claims.text: CRAFT is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance
claims.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

claims.text: Contact is not uniform across the hand, with impacts concentrating at joints while links carry most of the load
claims.source_quote: The design is based on a simple idea: contact is not uniform across the hand. Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

claims.text: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid
claims.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid

claims.text: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons
claims.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons

claims.text: CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability
claims.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

claims.text: CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items
claims.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

claims.text: The hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy
claims.source_quote: the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy
